faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: Kew Gardens Hills commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. These species build nests in trees, under eaves, in attics, and around porches. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all wasp species found in Queens.
